name: Sandstorm Gold Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. was a precious metals royalty and streaming company that provided upfront financing to mining companies in exchange for a percentage of future mine production. At its peak the company held a portfolio of over 230 royalties and streams spanning North America, South America, Africa, and Asia. In October 2025, Royal Gold Inc. completed its acquisition of Sandstorm Gold, resulting in the company being delisted from the TSX and NYSE.
